test2 col=100 right of plane0, in plane1 → visible

test4 col=100 inside window: PF3(5) beats PF4(3)
test4 col=50 outside window: PF3 clipped, PF4 wins
test4 col=200 outside window: PF3 clipped, PF4 wins

test5 sprite at col=100 word4=ctrl color=0x02

test5 col=85 sprite outside clip → sprite clipped, PF1 wins
test5 col=161 sprite outside clip → sprite clipped, PF1 wins

test6 col=200 right boundary, sense=1 → visible
